reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the sponsor associated with the Premiership Rugby Sevens Series name.
2. Determine what type of product that sponsor is and return the product type.
original_final_question: What type of product is the sponsor of the Premiership Rugby Sevens SeriesSeries? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which sponsor gives the Premiership Rugby Sevens Series its Singha name? Evidence: Premiership Rugby Sevens Series: The Premiership Rugby Sevens Series (known as the Singha Premiership Rugby 7s Series from 2015, though sponsorship from Singha) is a Rugby Sevens competition for the twelve Aviva Premiership clubs that will play the following season (i.e. the 2010 competition features the teams playing in the Aviva Premiership in the 2010–11 season). -> Singha
Node 2: What type of product is Singha? Evidence: Singha: Singha (Thai: สิงห์ ; ) is a 5% abv pale lager produced by Boon Rawd Brewery. -> pale lager
